mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social.carbon_market_realtime_snapshot ( id, trade_date, quote_time, last_price, change_percent, open_price, high_price, low_price, previous_close_price, daily_volume_tons, daily_turnover_cny, cumulative_volume_tons, cumulative_turnover_cny, daily_volume_text, daily_turnover_text, cumulative_volume_text, cumulative_turnover_text, source_curr_date, source_curr_time, synced_at ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.youthloop.common.persistence.UuidTypeHandler}, #{tradeDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{quoteTime, jdbcType=TIME}, #{lastPrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{changePercent, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{openPrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{highPrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{lowPrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{previousClosePrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dailyVolumeTons, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dailyTurnoverCny, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cumulativeVolumeTons, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cumulativeTurnoverCny, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dailyVolumeText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dailyTurnoverText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cumulativeVolumeText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cumulativeTurnoverText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceCurrDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceCurrTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{syncedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE} ) ON CONFLICT (trade_date, quote_time) DO UPDATE SET last_price = EXCLUDED.last_price, change_percent = EXCLUDED.change_percent, open_price = EXCLUDED.open_price, high_price = EXCLUDED.high_price, low_price = EXCLUDED.low_price, previous_close_price = EXCLUDED.previous_close_price, daily_volume_tons = EXCLUDED.daily_volume_tons, daily_turnover_cny = EXCLUDED.daily_turnover_cny, cumulative_volume_tons = EXCLUDED.cumulative_volume_tons, cumulative_turnover_cny = EXCLUDED.cumulative_turnover_cny, daily_volume_text = EXCLUDED.daily_volume_text, daily_turnover_text = EXCLUDED.daily_turnover_text, cumulative_volume_text = EXCLUDED.cumulative_volume_text, cumulative_turnover_text = EXCLUDED.cumulative_turnover_text, source_curr_date = EXCLUDED.source_curr_date, source_curr_time = EXCLUDED.source_curr_time, synced_at = EXCLUDED.synced_at
